meta.title: Portfolio - Kheir-eddine Abdellah
meta.description: Portfolio of Kheir-eddine Abdellah, a passionate web developer. Discover my projects and my journey.
header.presentation.title: About
header.presentation.body:
Hello, I'm Kheir-eddine Abdellah.
I am a passionate French web developer, I design and develop modern, smooth and immersive digital experiences. I pay close attention to detail, ergonomics and originality to deliver interfaces that are both aesthetic and efficient.
header.skills.title: Skills
header.skills.body1.prefix: I specialize in web and application development, with a solid foundation in front-end and application logic. I enjoy building clear, smooth and user-friendly interfaces, while keeping the code clean, readable and maintainable. I also pay constant attention to user experience, visual consistency and overall performance, especially with
header.skills.body2.prefix: As for tools, I rely on a simple and effective workflow to code, test, version, and regularly evolve my projects. I document my progress, organize my tasks properly, and validate my changes to deliver reliable results, especially
header.education.title: Education & Diplomas
header.education.item1:
General BAC — Lycée Hugues Libergier, Reims
General training with the acquisition of solid analytical and methodological bases. Specialties studied in 1st and Terminale classes: Digital and Computer Sciences (NSI) and Contemporary World English (AMC).
header.education.item2:
BTS SIO - SLAM track — Franklin Roosevelt High School, Reims
IT services curriculum focused on software development and business applications. Chosen track during the degree: Software Solutions and Business Applications (SLAM).
header.education.item3:
Certifications — PIX & Cambridge [B2]
Validation of digital and linguistic skills.

hobbies.title: Hobbies
hobbies.intro: Outside of code, I cultivate activities that strengthen my creativity, rigor and attention to detail in digital projects.
hobby.watch.title: Drawing (traditional & digital)
hobby.watch.desc: I practice drawing on paper and digitally. This helps me improve composition, attention to detail, and creativity that I reuse in my interfaces.
hobby.gaming.title: Rythm games
hobby.gaming.desc: I play rhythm games like Guitar Hero or Rock Band. This type of game greatly strengthens my focus, coordination, and consistency.
hobby.design.title: Design & Interfaces
hobby.design.desc: I like to explore visual references, create compositions, and test interaction ideas to enrich my interfaces.

stage.title: Internship
stage.optic.linkTitle: Open the Optic des Châtillons website
stage.intro: A page designed to present the internship I did to validate my 1st year of BTS SIO formation.
stage.presentation.title: Presentation of the internship
stage.presentation.body: My internship took place within the company Optic des Châtillons, where I had the opportunity to design a showcase website at the end of the 5-week internship. I worked a lot independently, while also benefiting from very rich exchanges with the manager, which were always constructive and interesting, whether for the visual design, the content, or the features.
stage.projectDescription.title: Project description
stage.projectDescription.body: The site has 5 pages: home, services, team, contact, and legal notices. It brings together the essential information for the shop, such as opening hours, location, available products, and team members. The most important information can be modified at any time by the manager through an admin panel that records and displays data in real time, making content management simple and fast. The site theme was also designed to harmonize with the 2 colors of the company logo, to strengthen the visual identity of the project.
stage.development.title: Project development
stage.development.nodeJs: Node.js : used to develop the backend part of the site and manage interactions with the administration panel, especially for recording and displaying data in real time.
stage.development.nginx: Nginx : used as a web server to deliver the site reliably and quickly to visitors.
stage.development.pm2: PM2 : used to keep the application online and restart it automatically in case of an issue, which makes deployment management easier.
stage.development.certbot: Certbot : used to secure the site with an HTTPS certificate, improving the trust and security of the solution.
stage.development.frontend: HTML, CSS and JavaScript : used to build the interface, style the pages, and add simple but useful interactions.
stage.bilan.title: Final statement
stage.bilan.body: This internship was a very enriching experience, both technically and professionally. It strengthened my interest in web development, my ability to work independently, and my motivation to continue my journey with greater confidence. I was able to lead a real project from start to finish, learn to respond to real needs, and see that the work completed was appreciated by the manager, which gave me even more confidence in the quality of my work.
stage.storyText: During my internship at [Company name], I discovered how a development team works and was able to take part in concrete missions. I learned to better organize my work, ask the right questions, and suggest simple, useful solutions that fit the project’s needs.
